selected: to stretch and grow and experience life

system.moves:
- Travel freely between young trees
- Spy on someone or something interesting
- Manifest a beautiful form of moving wood (unharmed by stabbing, vulnerable to fire)
- Call on the forest and its creatures for aid
- Spread word through the Great Wood

Youngest of the Brennauwed, a glasbren’s tree is barely more than a sapling. The world is full of wonder and life, and they would see it all. From time to time, a comely mortal will catch a glasbren’s eye. If the mortal proves kind and curious and full of life, it might reveal itself and shyly pursue a friend- ship—or more. When you give your heart or loyalty to a glasbren, your instinct becomes "Devotion: act in the glasbren’s interests." The glasbren becomes a follower (Cost: wonder and excitement; holds 2 Loyalty to start). When a season passes without you spending time with the glasbren, alone at her tree, she loses all Loyalty and you mark misera- ble. You cannot clear this debility without spending time with her.
